title: Privacy Policy | FHA Mortgages Florida
description: How FHA Mortgages Florida collects and uses your information.
bodyHtml:
Home/Privacy Policy
Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026 · This is a starting template — have your attorney review before publishing.

FHA Mortgages Florida (“we,” “us”) respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through fhamortgagesflorida.com and how we use it.

Information we collect

When you submit our quote or contact form we collect the details you provide, such as your name, email, phone number, loan goal, and county. We may also collect standard technical data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) through analytics.

How we use your information

  • To respond to your request and provide FHA loan information and quotes.
  • To contact you by phone, email, or text about mortgage options you asked about.
  • To improve our website and services.
  • To comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share it with service providers (such as our CRM or email provider) and licensed lending partners as needed to process your inquiry, and as required by law.

Cookies & analytics

We may use cookies and analytics tools to understand site usage. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

Your choices

You may opt out of marketing communications at any time by contacting us. You may also request access to or deletion of your information where applicable law allows.

Contact

Questions about this policy? Call us at __PHONE_DISPLAY__ or use our contact form.
